did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that discusses the history, concepts, and applications of AI in dermatology (e.g., melanoma detection, acne evaluation, psoriasis classification) but does not present original research where the authors used AI/ML methods to obtain new study results. It summarizes existing literature and technologies rather than conducting an AI-based experiment.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
